body.title: Sleep mode triggers by clock — 22:00-07:00 automatic sleep/maintenance cycle
body.result: SleepClockSource: nighttime (22-07) + MIN_AWAKE_HOURS gate → sleep maintenance (consolidation + TWM marker + ring trace). IGOR_SLEEP_CLOCK=true default. Slow tier. 17 tests.
body.description: Igor's sleep/maintenance mode should trigger automatically by clock (22:00-07:00), not wait for idle detection alone. During sleep: self-training passes, consolidation, habit failure review, stale task reaping. T-igor-modes (#406) describes the broad Awake/Background/Sleep concept but doesn't wire the clock trigger. Night_mode already exists in _resource_load_dict() — extend it to actually trigger the sleep cycle.
